Paracetamol.indications: Treats mild to moderate pain and reduces fever.
Paracetamol.critical_warnings: Severe fatal liver damage if maximum daily dose exceeded.

Ibuprofen.indications: Relieves pain, acute inflammation, and fever.
Ibuprofen.critical_warnings: High risk of severe stomach bleeding and kidney damage.

Diclofenac.indications: Severe acute pain and joint inflammation.
Diclofenac.critical_warnings: High risk of cardiovascular events and gastrointestinal bleeding.

Aspirin.indications: Mild pain, fever, and suspected heart attack.
Aspirin.dosage_adult: 300mg chewed for heart attack, orally for pain.
Aspirin.critical_warnings: Avoid in bleeding disorders; causes Reye's syndrome in youth.

Tramadol.indications: Moderate to severe acute or chronic pain.
Tramadol.critical_warnings: Risk of seizures, fatal respiratory depression, and severe addiction.

Ketorolac.dosage_adult: 10mg orally every 4 to 6 hours. Maximum 40mg per day. 5 days max.
Ketorolac.critical_warnings: High risk of severe gastrointestinal bleeding and kidney failure.

Mefenamic Acid.indications: Menstrual pain and moderate acute pain.
Mefenamic Acid.critical_warnings: Worsens asthma; causes severe gastrointestinal irritation and bleeding.

Aceclofenac.indications: Pain and inflammation in joints and muscles.
Aceclofenac.critical_warnings: Risk of heart failure and severe gastrointestinal ulcers.

Amoxicillin.indications: Common bacterial respiratory and skin infections.
Amoxicillin.critical_warnings: Fatal anaphylaxis risk in penicillin-allergic patients.

Amoxicillin + Clavulanic Acid.indications: Resistant bacterial infections and animal bites.
Amoxicillin + Clavulanic Acid.critical_warnings: Risk of severe liver toxicity and severe diarrhea.

Azithromycin.indications: Respiratory, skin, and diarrheal bacterial infections.
Azithromycin.critical_warnings: Can cause potentially fatal irregular heart rhythms.

Ciprofloxacin.indications: Severe urinary and gastrointestinal bacterial infections.
Ciprofloxacin.critical_warnings: High risk of tendon rupture and permanent nerve damage.

Doxycycline.indications: Atypical infections, scrub typhus, and cholera.
Doxycycline.critical_warnings: Avoid in pregnancy; causes severe extreme sensitivity to sunlight.

Metronidazole.indications: Anaerobic bacterial infections and amoebic dysentery.
Metronidazole.critical_warnings: Strictly avoid alcohol; causes severe violent vomiting reaction.

Ceftriaxone.indications: Severe, life-threatening bacterial infections like meningitis.
Ceftriaxone.dosage_adult: 1g to 2g via IV or IM once daily.
Ceftriaxone.critical_warnings: Never mix with IV calcium; forms fatal precipitates.

Cefixime.indications: Typhoid, respiratory, and urinary bacterial infections.
Cefixime.critical_warnings: Can cause severe Clostridium difficile-associated diarrhea.

Cotrimoxazole.indications: Urinary tract and severe respiratory bacterial infections.
Cotrimoxazole.dosage_adult: One double-strength tablet orally every 12 hours.
Cotrimoxazole.critical_warnings: Causes severe fatal skin peeling and bone marrow suppression.

Levofloxacin.indications: Severe respiratory, urinary, and skin infections.
Levofloxacin.critical_warnings: Tendon rupture, nervous system toxicity, and fatal heart arrhythmias.

Ofloxacin.indications: Typhoid, urinary, and severe pelvic infections.
Ofloxacin.critical_warnings: Risk of tendonitis and exacerbation of myasthenia gravis.

Norfloxacin.indications: Uncomplicated urinary tract and gastrointestinal infections.
Norfloxacin.critical_warnings: Tendon rupture risk; do not consume with dairy products.

Erythromycin.indications: Penicillin alternative for respiratory and skin infections.
Erythromycin.critical_warnings: Causes severe liver toxicity and fatal cardiac rhythm disturbances.

Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS).indications: Severe dehydration from acute diarrhea or vomiting.
Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS).dosage_adult: Mix 1 packet in 1L clean water. Drink continuously.
Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS).critical_warnings: Use strictly clean water; discard unconsumed solution after 24 hours.

Loperamide.dosage_adult: 4mg initially, then 2mg after each loose stool.
Loperamide.critical_warnings: Never use for bloody diarrhea or high fever dysentery.

Racecadotril.indications: Acute watery diarrhea without blood or fever.
Racecadotril.critical_warnings: Do not use for dysentery or severe renal impairment.

Ondansetron.dosage_adult: 4-8mg orally or dissolving tablet every 8 hours.
Ondansetron.critical_warnings: Prolongs QT interval; risk of sudden fatal heart arrhythmias.

Domperidone.indications: Nausea, vomiting, and delayed gastric emptying.
Domperidone.dosage_adult: 10mg orally up to three times daily.
Domperidone.critical_warnings: Risk of sudden cardiac death at very high doses.

Metoclopramide.indications: Severe nausea and impaired gastric emptying.
Metoclopramide.critical_warnings: Causes severe, irreversible involuntary muscle spasms and facial tics.

Promethazine.indications: Severe nausea, motion sickness, and allergic reactions.
Promethazine.critical_warnings: Fatal respiratory depression; causes tissue gangrene if injected intra-arterially.

Pantoprazole.indications: Severe acid reflux and bleeding peptic ulcers.
Pantoprazole.critical_warnings: Increases risk of severe intestinal infections and bone fractures.

Omeprazole.indications: Acid reflux, heartburn, and stomach ulcer treatment.
Omeprazole.dosage_adult: 20mg orally once daily before a meal.
Omeprazole.critical_warnings: Masks stomach cancer symptoms; dangerously lowers blood magnesium levels.

Ranitidine.indications: Mild acid reflux and general indigestion.
Ranitidine.critical_warnings: Dose adjustment required in patients with severe kidney disease.

Aluminium Hydroxide + Magnesium Hydroxid.indications: Immediate relief for heartburn, bloating, and gas.
Aluminium Hydroxide + Magnesium Hydroxid.dosage_adult: 10-20mL orally after meals and at bedtime.
Aluminium Hydroxide + Magnesium Hydroxid.critical_warnings: Blocks absorption of critical life-saving antibiotics if taken simultaneously.

Cetirizine.indications: Allergic reactions, hives, and severe itching.
Cetirizine.critical_warnings: Causes significant drowsiness; highly dangerous if operating heavy machinery.

Levocetirizine.indications: Allergic rhinitis and chronic skin allergies.
Levocetirizine.critical_warnings: Causes severe drowsiness and acute urinary retention in elderly.

Chlorpheniramine.indications: Acute allergic reactions and severe cold symptoms.
Chlorpheniramine.critical_warnings: High risk of profound sedation, dry mouth, and confusion.

Fexofenadine.indications: Non-drowsy relief for acute allergic reactions.
Fexofenadine.critical_warnings: Do not take with fruit juices; eliminates drug absorption.

Hydrocortisone.indications: Severe allergic reactions, asthma attacks, and shock.
Hydrocortisone.dosage_adult: 100mg IV or IM injection in acute emergencies.
Hydrocortisone.critical_warnings: Suppresses immune system; absolutely contraindicated in systemic fungal infections.

Dexamethasone.indications: Severe inflammation, brain swelling, and severe asthma.
Dexamethasone.critical_warnings: Rapidly spikes blood sugar; severely suppresses immune infection response.

Prednisolone.indications: Asthma flare-ups, severe allergies, and systemic inflammation.
Prednisolone.critical_warnings: Long-term use causes severe osteoporosis and adrenal gland failure.

Deflazacort.critical_warnings: Massively increases patient susceptibility to severe, life-threatening infections.

Epinephrine (Adrenaline).indications: Cardiac arrest and severe anaphylactic shock.
Epinephrine (Adrenaline).dosage_adult: 0.3mg to 0.5mg IM injected into outer thigh.
Epinephrine (Adrenaline).critical_warnings: Can trigger fatal heart arrhythmias and extreme hypertensive crisis.

Salbutamol.indications: Acute asthma attacks and severe bronchospasm.
Salbutamol.critical_warnings: Causes dangerously rapid heart rate, severe tremors, and hypokalemia.

Levosalbutamol.indications: Asthma attacks requiring fewer cardiac side effects.
Levosalbutamol.critical_warnings: Risk of paradoxical bronchospasm, causing sudden worsening of breathing.

Budesonide.indications: Long-term asthma control and severe croup.
Budesonide.critical_warnings: Causes severe oral fungal infections if mouth is unrinsed.

Dextromethorphan.critical_warnings: Fatal serotonin syndrome if mixed with certain psychiatric antidepressants.

Guaifenesin.indications: Chest congestion and thick mucus cough.
Guaifenesin.critical_warnings: Ineffective without aggressive hydration; must drink plenty of water.

Ambroxol.indications: Thick mucus, bronchitis, and respiratory tract infections.
Ambroxol.critical_warnings: May cause severe gastrointestinal distress and serious skin allergies.

Bromhexine.indications: Mucus clearance in severe chest and lung infections.
Bromhexine.critical_warnings: Use with extreme caution in patients with active gastric ulcers.

Povidone-Iodine.indications: Wound disinfection and pre-surgical skin preparation.
Povidone-Iodine.dosage_adult: Apply topically to cleaned wound area 1-3 times daily.
Povidone-Iodine.critical_warnings: Causes thyroid dysfunction with prolonged use on massive burns.

Chlorhexidine.indications: Skin disinfection and mouthwash for oral infections.
Chlorhexidine.dosage_adult: Apply to skin, or rinse mouth twice daily.
Chlorhexidine.critical_warnings: Causes permanent deafness if allowed to enter the inner ear.

Silver Sulfadiazine.indications: Prevention of infection in severe burn wounds.
Silver Sulfadiazine.dosage_adult: Apply 1/16-inch thick layer to burn wound daily.
Silver Sulfadiazine.critical_warnings: Can cause a severe, dangerous drop in white blood cells.

Hydrogen Peroxide.indications: Minor wound cleaning and removing dead tissue.
Hydrogen Peroxide.dosage_adult: Apply 3% solution topically directly to the wound.
Hydrogen Peroxide.critical_warnings: Destroys healthy tissue and delays healing if used repeatedly.

Surgical Spirit (Ethanol).indications: Disinfecting unbroken skin and cleaning medical instruments.
Surgical Spirit (Ethanol).dosage_adult: Apply topically to intact skin only.
Surgical Spirit (Ethanol).critical_warnings: Never apply to deep open wounds; causes massive tissue necrosis.

Clotrimazole.indications: Fungal skin infections like ringworm and athlete's foot.
Clotrimazole.dosage_adult: Apply thinly to affected area twice daily.
Clotrimazole.critical_warnings: Can cause severe localized redness, stinging, and chemical blistering.

Miconazole.indications: Fungal skin and severe vaginal yeast infections.
Miconazole.dosage_adult: Apply topically twice daily for 2-4 weeks.
Miconazole.critical_warnings: Can interact dangerously with blood thinners if absorbed systemically.

Fluconazole.indications: Systemic fungal infections and severe yeast infections.
Fluconazole.dosage_adult: 150mg orally as a single dose for yeast infections.
Fluconazole.critical_warnings: Causes severe liver damage and fatal cardiac rhythm abnormalities.

Ketoconazole.indications: Severe fungal skin infections and severe dandruff.
Ketoconazole.dosage_adult: Apply topical cream or shampoo once or twice daily.
Ketoconazole.critical_warnings: Oral administration causes severe, frequently fatal massive liver toxicity.

Terbinafine.indications: Severe ringworm and stubborn fungal nail infections.
Terbinafine.dosage_adult: Apply cream once daily, or 250mg orally daily.
Terbinafine.critical_warnings: Oral form strictly requires continuous, rigorous liver function monitoring.

Chlorine Tablets (Water Purification).indications: Purifying bacterially contaminated water for emergency drinking.
Chlorine Tablets (Water Purification).dosage_adult: Check packaging for ratio (usually 1 tab per 1L to 5L). Wait 30 mins.
Chlorine Tablets (Water Purification).critical_warnings: Highly toxic if swallowed directly; fatally destroys stomach lining.

Halazone Tablets.indications: Emergency chemical water disinfection and purification.
Halazone Tablets.dosage_adult: 1 tablet per 1 liter of water. Wait 30 minutes.
Halazone Tablets.critical_warnings: Totally ineffective against Cryptosporidium parasites; highly toxic raw.

Activated Charcoal.indications: Acute oral poisoning and recent drug overdoses.
Activated Charcoal.dosage_adult: 50-100g orally mixed with water immediately after ingestion.
Activated Charcoal.critical_warnings: Fatal lung damage if inhaled; NEVER give to unconscious or vomiting patients.

Diazepam.indications: Active seizures, severe acute anxiety, and muscle spasms.
Diazepam.critical_warnings: Causes fatal respiratory depression, especially if mixed with alcohol.

Midazolam.indications: Continuous seizures (status epilepticus) and procedural sedation.
Midazolam.dosage_adult: 5-10mg IM or IV for active seizing.
Midazolam.critical_warnings: Extremely high risk of complete breathing cessation; requires airway management.

Lorazepam.indications: Prolonged active seizures and severe acute anxiety.
Lorazepam.critical_warnings: Causes severe profound sedation and acute respiratory failure.

Phenytoin.indications: Long-term prevention of generalized tonic-clonic seizures.
Phenytoin.critical_warnings: Causes severe skin necrosis, liver damage, and bone marrow collapse.

Levetiracetam.indications: Broad-spectrum prevention of multiple seizure types.
Levetiracetam.critical_warnings: Can induce severe psychiatric depression, agitation, and suicidal thoughts.

Artemether + Lumefantrine.critical_warnings: Prolongs QT interval fatally; must be taken with high-fat food.

Artesunate.dosage_adult: 2.4mg/kg IV or IM at 0, 12, and 24 hours.
Artesunate.critical_warnings: Causes delayed, severe, and massive breakdown of red blood cells.

Chloroquine.indications: Vivax malaria treatment and generalized prophylaxis.
Chloroquine.critical_warnings: Causes permanent, irreversible eye damage and blindness with long-term use.

Primaquine.indications: Radical cure clearing liver-stage Vivax malaria.
Primaquine.dosage_adult: 15mg base orally daily for exactly 14 days.
Primaquine.critical_warnings: Causes massive fatal red blood cell destruction in G6PD deficiency.

Albendazole.dosage_adult: 400mg orally as a single one-time dose.
Albendazole.critical_warnings: Causes severe bone marrow suppression and acute liver toxicity.

Mebendazole.indications: Pinworms, roundworms, and hookworm intestinal infections.
Mebendazole.dosage_adult: 100mg orally twice daily for 3 consecutive days.
Mebendazole.critical_warnings: Strictly absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy; causes severe birth defects.

Ivermectin.indications: Severe scabies, lice, and severe strongyloidiasis.
Ivermectin.critical_warnings: Causes severe fatal neurological toxicity if blood-brain barrier is compromised.

Tetanus Toxoid (TT) Vaccine.indications: Prevention of fatal tetanus in contaminated wounds.
Tetanus Toxoid (TT) Vaccine.dosage_adult: 0.5mL IM injection into the deltoid muscle.
Tetanus Toxoid (TT) Vaccine.critical_warnings: Risk of anaphylaxis; wait 10 years between boosters unless wound heavily soiled.

Anti-Rabies Vaccine (ARV).indications: Post-exposure prevention of rabies after animal bite.
Anti-Rabies Vaccine (ARV).critical_warnings: Never skip any doses under any circumstance; rabies is 100% fatal.

Isosorbide Dinitrate.indications: Severe angina, suspected heart attack, and heart failure.
Isosorbide Dinitrate.critical_warnings: Causes massive fatal drop in blood pressure if mixed with Viagra.

Amlodipine.indications: Severe hypertension and chronic stable angina.
Amlodipine.critical_warnings: Causes severe fluid swelling in legs and severe low blood pressure.

Atorvastatin.indications: Prevention of heart attack, stroke, and high cholesterol.
Atorvastatin.critical_warnings: Causes severe massive muscle breakdown leading directly to acute kidney failure.

Clopidogrel.indications: Acute heart attack and prevention of fatal blood clots.
Clopidogrel.critical_warnings: Causes severe, uncontrollable, and potentially fatal bleeding from minor physical trauma.

Atropine.indications: Nerve gas poisoning and severe slow heart rate.
Atropine.dosage_adult: 0.5-1mg IV for heart rate; 2mg+ repeated aggressively for pesticide poisoning.
Atropine.critical_warnings: Causes extreme fatal tachycardia and severe acute urinary retention.

Calcium Gluconate.indications: Magnesium toxicity, severe low calcium, and severe hyperkalemia.
Calcium Gluconate.dosage_adult: 10mL of 10% solution IV slowly over 10 minutes.
Calcium Gluconate.critical_warnings: Causes immediate fatal cardiac arrest if injected IV too quickly.

Magnesium Sulfate.indications: Eclampsia (pregnancy seizures) and severe acute asthma.
Magnesium Sulfate.dosage_adult: 4g IV over 20 minutes for active eclampsia.
Magnesium Sulfate.critical_warnings: Causes total respiratory paralysis and loss of deep tendon reflexes.

Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid).indications: Severe scurvy, wound healing, and methemoglobinemia.
Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid).critical_warnings: Extremely high doses cause severe kidney stones in susceptible individuals.

Zinc Sulfate.indications: Severe childhood diarrhea and extreme zinc deficiency.
Zinc Sulfate.critical_warnings: Causes severe violent vomiting if taken on a completely empty stomach.

Vitamin K (Phytomenadione).indications: Warfarin overdose and severe systemic bleeding disorders.
Vitamin K (Phytomenadione).critical_warnings: Causes sudden severe anaphylactic shock if injected IV too rapidly.

Permethrin.indications: Severe scabies and head lice treatment.
Permethrin.dosage_adult: Apply 5% cream to whole body, wash off after 8-14 hours.
Permethrin.critical_warnings: May cause severe burning sensation; strictly avoid eyes and mouth.

Gamma Benzene Hexachloride (Lindane).indications: Second-line treatment for resistant scabies and lice.
Gamma Benzene Hexachloride (Lindane).dosage_adult: Apply lotion thinly, wash off strictly after 8-12 hours.
Gamma Benzene Hexachloride (Lindane).critical_warnings: Highly neurotoxic; causes severe seizures and brain damage if overused.

Hyoscine Butylbromide.indications: Severe stomach, intestinal, or kidney muscle spasms.
Hyoscine Butylbromide.critical_warnings: Severely worsens glaucoma; causes severe, dangerously rapid heart rate.

Dicyclomine.indications: Irritable bowel syndrome and severe intestinal cramps.
Dicyclomine.critical_warnings: Can cause fatal heat stroke by completely halting body sweating.

Drotaverine.indications: Severe biliary colic, renal colic, and menstrual spasms.
Drotaverine.critical_warnings: Causes severe sudden drop in blood pressure and vertigo if IV.

Potassium Permanganate.indications: Cleansing infected wounds and fungal foot infections.
Potassium Permanganate.dosage_adult: Dilute in water to 1:10000 ratio until pale pink.
Potassium Permanganate.critical_warnings: Highly chemically corrosive; fatally burns skin and throat if undiluted.

Lignocaine (Lidocaine).indications: Local anesthesia for suturing and ventricular arrhythmias.
Lignocaine (Lidocaine).dosage_adult: Inject locally. Maximum 4.5 mg/kg without adrenaline.
Lignocaine (Lidocaine).critical_warnings: Causes immediate seizures and cardiac arrest if accidentally injected into blood.

Bupivacaine.indications: Long-lasting local and spinal anesthesia for major surgery.
Bupivacaine.dosage_adult: Dose strictly varies by specific nerve block type.
Bupivacaine.critical_warnings: Extremely cardiotoxic; accidental IV injection causes irreversible fatal cardiac arrest.

Tranexamic Acid.indications: Severe massive trauma bleeding and heavy menstrual bleeding.
Tranexamic Acid.critical_warnings: High risk of causing massive, fatal systemic blood clots.

Ethamsylate.indications: Capillary bleeding and continuous surgical oozing.
Ethamsylate.critical_warnings: May induce severe deep vein thrombosis; avoid in severe asthma.

Normal Saline (0.9% NaCl).indications: Emergency volume resuscitation, hypovolemic shock, and severe dehydration.
Normal Saline (0.9% NaCl).dosage_adult: 500mL to 1L IV fluid bolus administered rapidly.
Normal Saline (0.9% NaCl).critical_warnings: Causes severe fluid overload and fatal pulmonary swelling in heart failure.

Ringer's Lactate (RL).indications: Massive volume blood loss, severe burns, and surgery.
Ringer's Lactate (RL).dosage_adult: Titrate IV infusion strictly to maintain adequate blood pressure.
Ringer's Lactate (RL).critical_warnings: Absolutely contraindicated in severe liver failure; body cannot metabolize lactate.

Dextrose 5% (D5).indications: Severe hypoglycemia and high sodium (hypernatremia) correction.
Dextrose 5% (D5).dosage_adult: IV infusion titrated based on caloric and fluid needs.
Dextrose 5% (D5).critical_warnings: Causes massive, fatal brain swelling if given during an acute stroke.

Ciprofloxacin Eye/Ear Drops.indications: Bacterial conjunctivitis and severe outer ear infections.
Ciprofloxacin Eye/Ear Drops.dosage_adult: 1-2 drops in affected eye or ear every 4 hours.
Ciprofloxacin Eye/Ear Drops.critical_warnings: Do not use if viral or fungal infection is suspected; worsens condition.

Xylometazoline.indications: Severe acute nasal congestion blocking airway.
Xylometazoline.critical_warnings: Causes extreme, permanent rebound congestion if used for more than 5 days.
